ContactPage.heroTitle: Clear routing from the first hello.
ContactPage.heroLede: Buyers, verified dealers, and fleet support—concierge follow-through, typically within one business day.
ContactPage.dealersLede: Work directly with verified partners who list inventory on ABRIEV — screened for transparent pricing and customer care.
ContactPage.contactLede: Sales enquiries, dealership partnerships, fleet support — one consistent team will route your note to the right specialist within one business day.
ContactPage.hoursBody: Monday–Saturday, 8:30 — 18:30 EAT. After-hours voicemail is monitored for urgent roadside and delivery coordination.
ContactPage.formLede: Include your timeline, preferred contact channel, and the region you are browsing from.
ContactPage.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Outline your enquiry, timeframe, city, and preferred contact channel.
ContactPage.spamNotice: Spam and automated payloads are discarded without notice.
ContactPage.locationLede: Concierge routing and partner meetings are coordinated from our Addis Ababa base.
ContactPage.mapIframeTitle: Map of Addis Ababa, Ethiopia — ABRIEV contact area
ContactPage.faqTitle: Quick answers before you write in.
ContactPage.faqLede: These cover common questions about reaching us and working with ABRIEV. Use the concierge desk above if yours is more specific.
ContactPage.faqBrowseAllAria: Open the FAQs page — more topics coming soon

faqItems.question: How quickly will ABRIEV respond?
faqItems.answer: Routine concierge notes are routed to the right specialist within one business day, often sooner during listed response hours.

faqItems.question: What should I include in my first message?
faqItems.answer: Your timeline, time zone or city, preferred contact channel, and whether you are buying, selling, partnering, or arranging logistics speeds up routing.

faqItems.question: How do verified dealers work with ABRIEV?
faqItems.answer: Listed partners undergo screening around pricing disclosure and buyer care expectations. Listing teams coordinate with concierge so customer threads stay coherent.

faqItems.question: Does ABRIEV support cross-border paperwork or freight?
faqItems.answer: Yes—import and export milestones are stewarded alongside compliance and customs steps. Mention origin, destination, and target delivery window.

ContactAction.messageShort: Share a short note (15+ characters) so we can help.
ContactAction.success: Thank you — our concierge acknowledged your enquiry. Expect a concise reply within one business day.
ContactAction.successBot: Thank you — we will reply shortly.
